prompt: /tdd implement a string utility module with functions: capitalize(str), truncate(str, maxLen), and slugify(str)

assertions.text: Detects or asks about the test framework before writing tests
Presents a work decomposition plan and asks for user confirmation
Test Writer creates test files BEFORE any implementation code
Tests fail initially (RED phase verified with non-zero exit code check)
Code Writer receives test contents from disk, not Test Writer output (information barrier)
Code Writer does NOT modify test files (checksum verification)
All tests pass after implementation (GREEN phase)
A tdd-report.md or summary is generated
No verification steps are skipped even for simple specs
